LanguageData.GS_Warden_Head.label: rough head
LanguageData.GS_Warden_Head.description: Carriers of this gene have a rough facial structure. A strip of unknown writing is present on their foreheads from birth.
LanguageData.GS_Skin_Lavender_Purple.label: lavender purple skin
LanguageData.GS_Skin_Lavender_Purple.description: Carriers of this gene have purple ish grey skin.
LanguageData.GS_Low_Fertility.label: low fertility
LanguageData.GS_Low_Fertility.description: Carriers of this gene have a lower chance of becoming pregnant or impregnating others.
LanguageData.GS_MeleeDamage_hyper_Strong.label: great melee damage
LanguageData.GS_MeleeDamage_hyper_Strong.description: Carriers of this gene do much more damage in close-quarters combat. Unpararreled fast-twitch muscle fibers make the power and accuracy of their strikes second to none.
LanguageData.GS_Solitary.label: Solitary
LanguageData.GS_Solitary.description: Carriers of this gene don’t like outsiders. Anyone who isn’t their own xenotype is met with distrust.
LanguageData.GS_Size_Bulky.label: bulky body
LanguageData.GS_Size_Bulky.description: Carriers of this gene have a larger, bulkier body structure.
